SORA-ULTIMATE_FORM_POWER.title: Ultimate Form
SORA-SITUATION_READY_POWER.description: Gain Situation Points (SP) to perform Situation Commands.
SORA-SITUATION_READY_POWER.smartDescript: You can now perform Situation Commands.
SORA-SITUATION_READY_POWER.title: Situation Command Ready
SORA-DAMAGE_SYPHON_POWER.description: Gain [gold]SP[/gold] equal to half of damage taken.
SORA-DAMAGE_SYPHON_POWER.smartDescriptio: Gain [gold]SP[/gold] equal to half of damage taken.
SORA-DAMAGE_SYPHON_POWER.title: Damage Syphon
SORA-KAIRI_POWER.description:
Gain 1 [gold]SP[/gold] from using [gold]Skills[/gold] for 3 turns. 
Add [gold]Seven Wishes[/gold] to your command. 
If you have [gold]Kairi's Link[/gold], add [gold]Trinity Limit[/gold] instead.
SORA-KAIRI_POWER.smartDescription:
Gain 1 [gold]SP[/gold] from using [gold]Skills[/gold] for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:turn|turns}. 
Add [gold]Seven Wishes[/gold] to your command. 
If you have [gold]Riku's Link[/gold], add [gold]Trinity Limit[/gold] instead.
SORA-KAIRI_POWER.title: Kairi's Link
SORA-RIKU_POWER.description:
Gain 1 additional [gold]SP[/gold] from attacks for 3 turns. 
Add [gold]Eternal Session[/gold] to your command. 
If you have [gold]Kairi's Link[/gold], add [gold]Trinity Limit[/gold] instead.
SORA-RIKU_POWER.smartDescription:
Gain 1 additional [gold]SP[/gold] from attacks for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:turn|turns}. 
Add [gold]Eternal Session[/gold] to your command or [gold]Trinity Limit[/gold] if you have [gold]Kairi's Link[/gold].
SORA-RIKU_POWER.title: Riku's Link
SORA-CLOUD_POWER.title: Cloud's Link
SORA-REFLECT_SORA_POWER.description: Blocked damage is reflected to your attacker for 1 turn.
SORA-REFLECT_SORA_POWER.smartDescription: Blocked damage is reflected to your attacker for 1 turn.
SORA-REFLECT_SORA_POWER.title: Reflect
SORA-FRIENDSHIP_POWER.description: Attacks deal 1 additional damage for each active [gold]Link[/gold].
SORA-FRIENDSHIP_POWER.smartDescription: Attacks deal {Amount} additional damage for each active [gold]Link[/gold].
SORA-FRIENDSHIP_POWER.title: Friendship
